message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
Ginny
How was NETS?
I went all the way there, but came back empty-handed.
What!? I thought you had a good focus!
That's too bad!
Welcome back.
Welcome back.
Boss, are you feeling unwell!?!
No.
It's not really that.
But, you seem kind of down.
No, it’s just that I ran into Eva.
Eva　Courtney!?
Did she target you this time?
Good job.

Looking closely, isn't the state of this office rather bleak?
Seeing this scenery makes it feel like a messy, drunken detective's office.
I like the old-fashioned feel of this office, but once I get paid for the current job, maybe I'll think about moving to a new place.
is typing away at the keyboard in silence. That rhythm sometimes
lures me into a pleasant sleep.
ｚｚｚｚｚ
What on earth does he do facing the computer every day?
or something like that.
Thorough analysis of the great detective
He said he was working on some stack project, but I have no idea what that means.
I thought going to NETS would help me understand about Guy, but that turned out to be a naive thought.
But, could it really be that Guy is like that?
Even so, it's true that Guy hasn’t given me any contact information, right? He’s just outrageous.
Right now, I'm in the middle of creating an America criminal database, and I think I might just include Guy in it.
Why on earth would I?
Because he's an idiot who makes women unhappy and doesn't even contact the company. Hmph.
Today's
seems to be broken.
Ah, geez.
Why does it never go well, I wonder?
It’s a problem if the Boss isn’t feeling well.
H-Hey, are you really worried about me?
No, if you're gloomy and down, a heavy air fills the room, and it drags my mood down too.
Ah, I see. Sorry about that.
I only have my brightness to offer, so I’d appreciate your consideration.
Boss, I just thought of a great idea.
What is it?
If the Boss and Eva got together, you wouldn't have to worry about her anymore.
I don't think that's a good idea at all.
Is that so?
I thought it was a good idea.
Boss, as detectives, we shouldn't give others a chance to take advantage of us. You understand that, right?
After that, just report to Meryl and arrange a meeting between Cindy and Meryl, and it’ll be done.
But they must have already met several times without knowing it.
If only Cindy would agree, it would be a breeze from there.
That's the tricky part.
But we’ve finally come this far, haven’t we? Thanks to a bit of luck, it’s all good.
It's not over yet.
No, it's almost over.
Don’t worry, if the Boss persuades her, Cindy will understand.
What on earth happened in your past?
According to Günter, her current state is due to something from the past.
So it means that something in the past wasn't directly caused by Guy.
Is that what you're saying?
Yeah, that seems to be the case. But still, I'd want to say that they should have made it clear from the start.
Please, don’t say something unreasonable. People’s hearts aren’t easy to understand.
I'm really worried.
Earlier,
when I saw him, he was acting strange. He even talked to Gai, who shouldn't be there.
That's really odd.
Nothing I say seems to get through. It's like she's escaped into this imaginary world she created.
I wonder what suddenly happened?
Isn't she okay by now? Gai's issue is still there, but she's been getting counseling for her heart.
Can it really be healed that easily?
I mean, she just started acting weird, right? The boss is.
So lenient, aren't you?
There's no use worrying that much. It's a time for observation.
You should come out and atone for your sins!
That's the vibe.
Regardless of the situation, it's undeniable that Gai was the trigger.
That's true, but.
You've completely come to hate Gai, huh?
Of course! It's all because Gai has turned into a sleazy guy.
Ugh, I hate it. I don't even want to say his name.
Isn't it Gai's fault that things have become so difficult again?
I won't deny that.
Gai is a heartless, despicable guy!
And I'm not cheering for NETS anymore.
A guy who hasn't even contacted his own baseball team should be ignored, ignored! The boss should stop being friends with him too.
It can't be helped.
But,
I can't help but feel it's unreasonable.
I thought about it a lot, but Cindy and Meryl were somewhat similar, right?
Is that so?
That's right. I was already thinking about it at the party. I really am amazing, aren’t I? Hehehe.
Please hurry and persuade him, Boss.
Don’t say it so easily.
It's fine, with you, Boss, it’ll definitely be okay.
I'll pray that Cindy agrees to meet her birth parents.
Yeah, I'm doing my best too!
It’s not good to speak ill of others without really knowing them.
Just having talked a bit with you, if someone pinpointed the cause of your mental distress, that’s a fortune teller.
But isn’t that how it usually is?
Counseling is the process of listening to someone and helping them release the trauma inside their heart.
Ugh.
Hmm, it’s hard to understand.
How about you try counseling too, Boss?
Is Gunter really a skilled psychiatrist?
Oh, come on, Boss, that’s rude.
Please don’t speak badly of the doctor. I was saved by him.
But, you know, after saying that having Gai around is important, it’s weird to think there’s something in the past.
That’s strange.
Boss, just because you’re not good with Gunter doesn’t mean you should say that.
Gunter is excellent. Why not try counseling next time, Boss?
I’ll pass on that.
Come on, when you're stressed like now, you really should try counseling.
It’s rare for a Boss to say they don’t want to go to counseling.
That’s a bit unusual.
What’s up with Gabriela’s request?
No, there’s been no progress.
Boss, do you really have any motivation to be serious about this?!
It's not my fault that there's an overwhelming lack of information!
Something's off about this. You’re not really keeping
anyone locked up, right?
Well, I can understand why you might feel that way.
Mainly,
there aren’t even any clues to speak of.
But you know, a detective should solve cases even without any clues.
Got it.
Then,
let’s do our best.
Why do you say that? I get that it’s hard to break old habits, but please work properly.
Boss, let’s awaken the detective in us and do our best from now on.
Have you heard anything decent from Tonny?
No, I haven't seen him since then.
That’s not good! He might have already fled abroad by now.
Boss, I've thought for a while now that you're a bit too lenient. You need to step it up.
Ugh.
Well, I think I’m doing my best.
That’s not enough! It’s just completely inadequate! You need to take things seriously.
What will you do if Tonny escapes?
Jeez.
Eva is as lively as ever; I almost wanted to borrow some of her energy.
I really should have borrowed some of her energy.
I feel like I'm on the verge of dying from exhaustion.
No, I'm just getting a headache thinking about Eva.
Ah, I see.
Did she say something to you?
Apparently, she's going to write an article about me next.
What!? Then you're going to be famous, Boss!
Wow.
That's incredible.
Isn't it amazing? What on earth are you thinking?
Boss!
It’s okay, really. Nothing bad is going to happen, trust me.
I wonder why Eva targeted an ordinary guy like Boss?
Meryl’s search for her daughter will end when Cindy and Meryl meet.
However, it seems Cindy was confused by the sudden appearance of her biological mother.
It won't go smoothly, that's for sure.
With her daughter found, Meryl can surely focus on her work, no matter the outcome.
Now, the filming should go smoothly.
What in the world happened in her past?
Günter said this.
Could there have been something in her past?
He said.
Until now, I never felt fear towards her in our interactions.
If that was just a joke, then that’s one thing. But if it wasn't a joke,
there’s nothing I can do now but wait for her to recover.
I hope she gets better soon and returns to the confident woman she used to be.
I haven't seen Cindy since then, but when I do, I have to make her agree to meet her biological mother.
Let's keep the fact that Meryl is her biological mother a secret until they meet.
It's hard to believe that there are many patients who trust him.
When he said he went crazy, it sounded like he was making excuses about a new cause.
That can't be it, right?
Ultimately, it means the counseling hasn’t worked.
Her symptoms have worsened. Was Günter providing proper counseling?
For now, thanks to his counseling,
she seems to be recovering.
But why do I still feel a sense of unease?
Could it be an illusion that he seems like a shady man?
Gabriela looked haggard, but is she okay?
I want to lighten Gabriela's worries, but,
what should I do about that situation?
I haven't seen Tonny for a while, but I need to seriously hear him out.
The incoherent state he was in when we last met is probably due to drugs, right?
Is it now a love story between me and Cindy? What the hell is she thinking?
Digging into people's pasts, is she planning to mess with my privacy this time?
If it's an outrageously bad article, I should consider taking it to court.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
